productDisplayName: Nike Men's Training Black White T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack round neck training t-shirt made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, with heat transfer swoosh logo and T90 lettering on the chest and mesh back panelFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water or hand wash separately Do not use softeners Do not bleach Tumble dry on low Cool iron Do not iron on design Do not dry clean  Get ready to score goals with this lightweight nike T90 football training tee.
